note: Python-loop Hamiltonian construction in JAX is catastrophically slow due to XLA trace overhead. Fixed approach: build H in numpy/Rust, only use JAX GPU for eigh+SVD.

n4.verdict: JAX 245x SLOWER (trace overhead dominates at small dim)

lesson: JAX GPU only beneficial when eigh/SVD dominates (n>=14, dim>=16384). For n<=10, numpy+Rust is orders of magnitude faster. Fixed jax_accel.py to build H in numpy/Rust and only send to GPU for linear algebra.
